administered_by: PME MTL (on behalf of the City of Montreal)
description_en: The FLI (Local Investment Fund) provides risk financing to SMEs and social economy enterprises in Montreal that cannot fully access traditional financing. It offers flexible loans to support business creation and growth.
description_fr: Le FLI fournit du financement à risque aux PME et entreprises d'économie sociale de Montréal qui ne peuvent pas accéder pleinement aux sources traditionnelles.

eligibility.note_en: Priority given to innovative projects, social economy, and underrepresented entrepreneurs

complementary_programs_en: Fonds de développement des entreprises d'économie sociale (FDEÉS) — for co-ops and non-profits
Fonds Femmes Montréal — for women entrepreneurs
